items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the scenario where the group size changes after booking, but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms this behavior. The linked use cases and prior steps do not address the specific functionality or outcomes related to changes in group size, leading to an inconclusive status. Without concrete evidence or tests demonstrating this scenario, the requirement cannot be validated.
